property_details.address: Rays Villa, Racket Lane, 30525 Grand Baie, Mauritius
property_details.description: Discover your perfect family or group escape in the heart of Grand Baie, with a combined duplex and modern studio ideal for families or larger groups of up to 9 guests. Nestled in the heart of Grand Baie, this secure, gated retreat places you just a few minutes away from local shops, restaurants, and the beautiful public beach. Whether you’re seeking a relaxing getaway or an adventure-filled holiday, The space offers ample space and privacy for an unforgettable stay.
property_details.space:
It features a tastefully designed duplex with three bedrooms, 3 bedrooms including one master bedroom, as well as an attached studio that offers a cozy, independent retreat. Each bedroom is thoughtfully furnished with plush bedding to ensure a restful night’s sleep. The duplex provides two bathrooms and three toilets, offering convenience for all guests.

The fully equipped open kitchen in the duplex makes meal preparation a breeze, while the studio includes its own kitchenette for added privacy. Both the duplex and the studio boast inviting living spaces, excellent air ventilation, and a welcoming ambiance. Step onto the private balconies in the duplex to soak up some fresh air, or lounge by the large shared swimming pool for a refreshing dip. With free on-site parking and a quiet, secure setting, this space ensures a tranquil and enjoyable holiday for everyone.
